mapper.select: SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE cloth_paper_types SET type_name = #{typeName}, category = #{category}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE cloth_paper_types SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types WHERE type_name = #{typeName} AND category = #{category} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, type_name as typeName, category, sort_order as sortOrder, is_active as isActive, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cloth_paper_types WHERE type_name = #{typeName} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
